records.title: First-time-through rate
records.summary: Track the percentage of vehicles passing end-of-line quality inspection without rework by plant, model, and shift.
records.metric_definition: Vehicles passing final inspection without rework divided by total vehicles produced.
records.methodology_note: Include both hard defects and cosmetic issues; segment by defect category.

records.title: Warranty cost per unit
records.summary: Measure total warranty claims cost per vehicle sold by model, region, and failure mode to drive quality improvement.
records.metric_definition: Total warranty expenditure divided by vehicles in warranty period.

records.title: Automotive quality management traceability
records.summary: Maintain full build traceability from component lot to finished vehicle VIN to enable rapid root-cause analysis and targeted recalls.

records.title: Supply chain multi-tier visibility
records.summary: Maintain real-time visibility into tier-1 through tier-N supplier delivery, quality, and capacity to prevent line stoppages.

records.title: Aftersales and connected vehicle monetization
records.summary: Grow aftersales revenue through telematics-driven service scheduling, parts demand forecasting, and subscription-based connected services.

records.title: Omnichannel retail transformation
records.summary: Unify online configuration, finance, trade-in, and showroom experiences to reduce purchase friction and grow digital sales penetration.

records.title: Connect vehicle telematics to aftersales service scheduling and parts demand
records.summary: Prioritize use cases that link connected vehicle diagnostic and usage data to service appointment scheduling and parts inventory forecasting, enabling predictive maintenance offers before breakdown rather than reactive dealer visits.

records.title: Maintain VIN-level traceability across build, warranty, and recall data
records.summary: Prefer use cases that preserve VIN-level traceability from factory build parameters through warranty claims to recall campaigns, enabling root cause analysis that spans the full vehicle lifecycle and supplier responsibility.
